name: Hawaiian Chicken Triangles
recipeIngredient: 4 slices Pullman loaf white or egg bread, cut 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
A. Prepare the Pullman loaf by slicing it horizontally into 8 equal rounds using a 4-inch round cookie cutter.
B. In a bowl, mix the butter and candied ginger until combined; set aside.
C. Combine chicken, pineapple, walnuts, and mayonnaise in another bowl until well mixed; set aside.
D. Spread each bread round with a thin layer of the ginger-butter mixture, reserving some for garnish.
E. Place an even layer of the chicken mixture on four of the bread rounds and top with the remaining four rounds to form four sandwiches.
F. Cut each sandwich into 8 equal triangles.
G. Brush the rounded edges of the triangles with the reserved ginger butter and dip in the chopped mint.
H. In a pastry bag fitted with a star tip, mix cream cheese and turmeric until well combined.
I. Pipe a yellow star in the center of each triangle.
J. Arrange the sandwiches on a platter and refrigerate until serving time. Makes 32 servings.
If fresh mint is unavailable, fresh chopped parsley may be substituted.
